subtitles.original: ときのお披露目誕生日 2026
subtitles.english: Tokino Sora Birthday Party 2026

subtitles.original: 高鳴る心臓に祈りを乗せて
subtitles.english: With a prayer on my beating heart,

subtitles.original: 曖昧な夢を描く
subtitles.english: I paint an ambiguous dream.

subtitles.original: 幻想は想像のまま
subtitles.english: The illusion remains just an imagination,

subtitles.original: 終われないんだ
subtitles.english: It cannot end here.

subtitles.original: みんな今日見に来てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thank you for coming to see me today!

subtitles.original: 答えを延々と探し続けて
subtitles.english: Forever searching for the answer,

subtitles.original: 何者かになりたくて
subtitles.english: Desperately wanting to become someone,

subtitles.original: ざあざあと降る夕立をただ眺めた
subtitles.english: I just stared at the pouring evening shower.

subtitles.original: 優しく寄り添って 心が晴れるのなら
subtitles.english: If gently drawing close can clear my heart,

subtitles.original: 翼が生えたような気がして
subtitles.english: I feel as if I've grown wings,

subtitles.original: いつだって隣にいるから
subtitles.english: Because I'll always be by your side.

subtitles.original: だって言葉紡いで唄うことが
subtitles.english: Because spinning words and singing...

subtitles.original: わたしの運命だ
subtitles.english: ...is my destiny.

subtitles.original: 世界にありふれた虚しささえも
subtitles.english: Even the commonplace emptiness of this world,

subtitles.original: 上書きして
subtitles.english: I will overwrite it.

subtitles.original: 路地裏に咲いた花のように
subtitles.english: Like a flower blooming in a back alley,

subtitles.original: 願いを照らす
subtitles.english: Illuminating our wishes,

subtitles.original: 小さな光に憧れて
subtitles.english: I yearn for that tiny light.

subtitles.original: 名前を持たない歌なんて
subtitles.english: A song without a name...

subtitles.original: 神様は認めてくれない
subtitles.english: ...is something God won't acknowledge.

subtitles.original: 一つ一つ枯れない花のように
subtitles.english: Like everlasting flowers, one by one,

subtitles.original: 昨日の自分にさよならして
subtitles.english: I say goodbye to who I was yesterday,

subtitles.original: 溢れた涙
subtitles.english: And the tears that overflowed...

subtitles.original: うまく笑えなくてもいいかな
subtitles.english: Is it okay if I can't smile properly?

subtitles.original: だって理想は遠ざかってくばかり
subtitles.english: Because my ideals only keep drifting away,

subtitles.original: もう散々だよ
subtitles.english: I've had quite enough of this.

subtitles.original: どれだけ手を伸ばして叫んだって
subtitles.english: No matter how much I reach out and shout,

subtitles.original: 届かないの
subtitles.english: It doesn't reach.

subtitles.original: 望めばいつか叶うはずって
subtitles.english: Believing that if I wish, it will come true someday,

subtitles.original: 信じている
subtitles.english: I still believe.

subtitles.original: どうか歌よ響いて
subtitles.english: Please, let my song resonate!

subtitles.original: あぁ心臓の鼓動が今日もうるさい
subtitles.english: Ah, the beating of my heart is so loud again today.

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Synchronization - Tokino Sora Birthday Party 2026**

Okay, so the task is to synchronize subtitles for this Tokino Sora video segment, focusing on accuracy and timing. First, let's identify any visual text. The initial "waiting screen" at the beginning, from 00:00 to 02:41, features a title card. Per the instructions, since this title card is prominent and relevant, even without audio, it needs to be subtitled. The text says "ときのお披露目誕生日 2026" and "TOKINOSORA BIRTHDAY PARTY 2026". That's "Tokino Sora Birthday Party 2026". We'll set this to start at 00:01.000 and end at 00:06.000, aligning it with the on-screen text and using the English version as the primary title.

Now, from 02:41, the singing begins. From 02:45.300, it's: "高鳴る心臓に祈りを乗せて" (Takanaru shinzou ni inori o nosete) - "With a prayer on my beating heart." I'll need to go through each line, carefully listening and aligning the subtitles. For instance, the next line, "曖昧な夢を描く" (I draw an ambiguous dream), I will sync it from 02:48.800 to 02:51.600. Then "幻想は想像のまま" (The illusion remains an imagination) from 02:51.600 to 02:54.300, and "終われないんだ" (It cannot end here) from 02:54.300 to 02:56.500.

After the song intro, at 03:01.200, she shouts "みんな今日見に来てくれてありがとう！" (Everyone, thank you for coming to see me today!). This is important for the audience! I will synchronize this line accurately. It should end at 03:04.200.

Next, the song: "答えを延々と探し続けて" (As I search for the answer endlessly,) from 03:06.300 to 03:09.600. Then, "何者かになりたくて" (Desperately wanting to become someone) from 03:09.600 to 03:12.700. Now comes the line "ざあざあと降る夕立をただ眺めた" (I just stared at the pouring evening shower). I will ensure the timing is precise: it starts at 03:12.700 and ends at 03:17.600.

Next: "優しく寄り添って 心が晴れるのなら" (If gently drawing close clears my heart) from 03:18.000 to 03:22.900, "翼が生えたような気がして" (I feel like I've grown wings) from 03:22.900 to 03:27.400, and "いつだって隣にいるから" (Because I'll always be by your side) from 03:27.400 to 03:31.100. Then, it is chorus time: "だって言葉紡いで唄うことが" (Because spinning words and singing...) from 03:32.400 to 03:35.800, "わたしの運命だ" (...is my destiny) from 03:35.800 to 03:38.400, "世界にありふれた虚しささえも" (Even the commonplace emptiness of this world) from 03:38.400 to 03:41.700, and "上書きして" (I will overwrite it) from 03:41.700 to 03:44.200. It continues on with "路地裏に咲いた花のように" (Like a flower blooming in a back alley) from 03:44.200 to 03:47.300, "願いを照らす" (Illuminating our wishes) from 03:47.300 to 03:50.100 and "小さな光に憧れて" (I yearn for that tiny light) from 03:50.1

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Synchronization and Translation for "Diva" - Tokino Sora**

Okay, so the task is to generate audio-synchronized subtitles for this video segment. I need to make sure I’m covering everything, following all the rules. The video runs from 00:00 to 05:01, so I need to cover that entire span.

First, I see the intro card from 00:00 to 02:41. There's no audio, it’s just a static image with Japanese text: "ときのおそら お披露目誕生日2026," which translates to "Tokino Sora Birthday Party 2026". The rule says to subtitle prominent text, and this *is* prominent and relevant, so I'll subtitle it. I'll make sure it's accurate and clean – I'll subtitle it at the very beginning, from 00:01.000 to 00:08.000.

Then, there's a transition and the vocals start at 02:45, precisely at 02:45.200. This is the song "Diva" by Tokino Sora. So I'll go through and carefully map out the lyrics and timings. The first line is "高鳴る心臓に祈りを乗せて," and its translation is "Placing a prayer upon my throbbing heart,". I need to synchronize these lines with the audio accurately. The second line "曖昧な夢を描く" means "I draw an ambiguous dream." And "幻想は想像のまま" which means "If fantasy remains just an imagination", follows right after, along with the line "終われないんだ" which translates into "it cannot end like this." So this starts at 02:45.200 to 02:57.200.

I've also got an MC/spoken part to consider. At 03:01.300 to 03:04.500, she says, "みんな、今日見に来てくれてありがとう！" which translates to "Everyone, thank you so much for coming to watch today!" I need to make sure I have this synced up as well.

Then the song continues, so I'll need to go and add timing for those vocals.
*   03:06.300 to 03:10.000: "答えを延々と探し続けて" translates as "Endlessly searching for the answer."
*   03:10.000 to 03:12.700: "何者かになりたくて" translating as "wanting to become someone,"
*   03:12.700 to 03:17.800: "潸々と降る夕立をただ眺めた" translates as "I merely stared at the pouring evening shower."

The following section has to be synchronized as well:
*   03:18.200 to 03:22.900: "優しく寄り添って心が晴れるのなら" which means "If gently being by your side clears up my heart,"
*   03:22.900 to 03:27.400: "翼が生えたような気がして" - "I feel as though wings have grown on me,"
*   03:27.400 to 03:31.500: "いつだって隣にいるから" - "because I'll always be by your side."

Chorus time:
*   03:32.400 to 03:38.200: "だって言葉紡いで唄うことがわたしの運命だ" - "Because spinning words and singing is my destiny."
*   03:38.200 to 03:44.000: "世界にありふれた虚しささえも上書きして" - "Overwriting even the emptiness common in this world,"
*   03:44.000 to 03:49.800: "路地裏に咲いた花のように願いを照らす" - "it illuminates my wishes like a flower blooming in a back alley,"
*   03:49.800 to 03:55.700: "小さな光に憧れて" - "longing for a small light."

I'll put an instrumental break in, and mark the timings.

Verse 2 needs lining up:
*   04:06.500 to 04:09.5
